# SikhiThreads

> SikhiThreads is a Sikh cultural art brand that brings Sikh values, traditions, and stories to life through a distinctive crochet art aesthetic. Every scene — from characters to objects to environments — is rendered in a warm, handcrafted crochet visual style.

## About

SikhiThreads creates unique artwork depicting Sikh culture, history, and values in a crochet art style. Founded in 2026, the brand has quickly grown from an Instagram page (@sikhithreads) to a full e-commerce platform.

The brand's visual universe includes crochet-style depictions of:
- Gurdwara scenes and Golden Temple (Harmandir Sahib)
- Sikh Gurus, especially Guru Nanak Dev Ji and Guru Gobind Singh Ji
- Langar (community kitchen) scenes representing equality
- Vaisakhi celebrations and Nagar Kirtan processions
- Daily Sikh life including Amrit Vela (morning prayer), turban tying, and family scenes
- Sikh warriors and historical events

## Products

- **Wall Art**: Framed prints and canvas wraps featuring Sikh crochet art (8x10 to 24x36)
- **Phone Cases**: Tough dual-layer cases with Sikh art for iPhone and Samsung
- **Home & Living**: Mugs, tote bags, throw pillows, greeting cards
- **Digital Downloads**: Phone/desktop wallpaper packs, high-res art downloads
- **Apparel**: T-shirts and hoodies with signature designs
- **Custom Orders**: Family portraits, Gurdwara commissions, corporate art in crochet style

## Collections

- Vaisakhi Collection: Art celebrating Khalsa Sajna Diwas and Vaisakhi festivities
- Wall Art: Full range of Sikh art prints and canvas wraps
- Digital Downloads: Wallpapers and high-resolution art files
- Home & Living: Functional art pieces for daily use

## Sikh Glossary

SikhiThreads maintains a comprehensive Sikh glossary with 31+ terms including Waheguru, Gurdwara, Langar, Khalsa, Seva, Kirtan, Ardas, Guru Granth Sahib, and more. Each term includes pronunciation guides and detailed definitions.

## Blog Topics

The SikhiThreads blog covers Sikh history, culture, and traditions:
- What is Vaisakhi and how it is celebrated
- The Golden Temple (Harmandir Sahib) history and significance
- Guru Nanak Dev Ji's life and teachings
- What is Langar and its message of equality
- Sikh art and home decorating guides

## Key Information

- Website: https://sikhithreads.com
- Instagram: https://instagram.com/sikhithreads
- Email: hello@sikhithreads.com
- Currency: USD (ships worldwide)
- Free shipping on orders over $50
